,v84));break;end end end elseif (v92==99) then v89[v91[2]]=v89[v91[3]] -v91[4] ;elseif (v91[1 + 1 ]<=v89[v91[4 + 0 ]]) then v83=v83 + 1 ;else v83=v91[1058 -(87 + 968) ];end elseif (v92<=102) then if (v92>105) then local v312=0;local v313;while true do if (v312==0) then v313=v91[2];do return v21(v89,v313,v313 + v91[3] );end break;end end else local v314=v91[2];do return v21(v89,v314,v84);end end v320=v89[v319];for v372=v319 + 1 ,v84 do v15(v320,v89[v372]);end else local v321=0;local v322;local v323;while true do if (v321==0) then v322=v91[2];v323=v89[v91[3]];v321=1;end if (v321==1) then ;v89[v326]=v328;v325=2;end end end elseif (v92>115) then v89[v91[2]]=v89[v91[3]][v89[v91[4]]];else v89[v91[2]]=v89[v91[3]] -v89[v91[4]] ;end elseif (v92<=118) then if (v92>117) then end;end return v40(v39(),{},v28)(...);end return v23("LOL!",v17(),...);
